items.description:

https://www.roblox.com/communities/16854864

Officially Licensed by #Forever Drip Corp.

Why We’re the #1 Hood & Street Animation Group on Roblox
╰┈➤ #Forever Drip isn’t just a brand — it’s a lifestyle. We create the smoothest, coldest, most realistic animations in the game. From city block vibes to runway energy, our animation packs bring your avatar to life and make every movement hit different. Whether you’re walking through the hood, styling a fit, or just standing still — our animations make sure you stand out.
